description: Add BucketDeployment construct to CDK stack and update deployment documentation
steps: Run `pnpm install` in the workspace root to install all dependencies.
Modify `apps/infra/src/stacks/recipe-manager-stack.ts`: Add import for `BucketDeployment` and `Source` from `aws-cdk-lib/aws-s3-deployment`.

Add a `BucketDeployment` construct after the CloudFront distribution definition. Use construct ID `FrontendDeployment` (PascalCase per conventions). Configure it with: `sources: [Source.asset(path.join(__dirname, '../../../../dist/apps/web/browser'))]`, `destinationBucket: frontendBucket`, `distribution: distribution` (for automatic CloudFront cache invalidation), `distributionPaths: ['/*']`.

Update `.kiro/steering/deployment.md`: Remove the 'Frontend Deployment' section (the manual `aws s3 sync` and CloudFront invalidation steps). Update the 'CDK Deployment' section's resource list to include 'S3 BucketDeployment (deploys Angular build output and invalidates CloudFront)'. Update the 'CI/CD Considerations' section to remove steps 4 and 5 (s3 sync and CloudFront invalidation) since `cdk deploy` now handles frontend deployment automatically.
Run `pnpm nx build infra` to verify the CDK code compiles successfully.
Run `pnpm cdk synth` to verify the CloudFormation template generates correctly with the new BucketDeployment resource.
acceptance_criteria: `pnpm nx build infra` completes without errors
`pnpm cdk synth` produces a valid CloudFormation template containing an AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource for the BucketDeployment
The BucketDeployment construct references the existing frontendBucket and distribution
The deployment.md no longer contains manual `aws s3 sync` or `aws cloudfront create-invalidation` commands
The deployment.md mentions that frontend deployment is handled automatically by `cdk deploy`
findings: BucketDeployment requires the source asset directory to exist at synth time. Created a placeholder dist/apps/web/browser directory for cdk synth verification. The generated CloudFormation template correctly contains Custom::CDKBucketDeployment resources with DistributionPaths set to ['/*'].
